headline: The Bull Case For Eli Lilly (LLY) Could Change Following New Multi‑Target R&D Alliances With Biotechs
summary: In recent days, Abbisko Therapeutics and BioArctic each announced new research and license agreements with Eli Lilly, adding multi-target discovery work worth up to about US$1.90 billion in milestones for Abbisko and up to US$770 million for BioArctic, alongside royalties on any future product sales. These alliances, paired with Lilly’s ongoing advances in obesity, oncology, and neurodegeneration programs, underline how external partnerships are being used to broaden its pipeline beyond its...
